zh.Castilla y León, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alfonso Téllez de Meneses於大約1161年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 拉 維亞時，他的父親Tello Pérez de Meneses21歲，母親Gontroda García de Villamayor23歲。他於大約1201年與Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos在西班牙卡斯利亞 拉 維亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1230年在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德可爾可斯 德爾 巴耶享年70歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alfonso Téllez de Meneses于大约1161年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 拉 維亞时，他的父亲Tello Pérez de Meneses21岁，母亲Gontroda García de Villamayor23岁。他于大约1201年与Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos在西班牙卡斯利亞 拉 維亞结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1230年在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德可爾可斯 德爾 巴耶享年70岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德。

nameMeanings.name: Téllez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ramon, Manuel, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Javier, Roberto, Jorge, Mario.
Spanish (Téllez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Tello .

variants.name: Tello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Fernando, Pedro, Francisco, Arturo, Miguel, Carlos, Manuel, Pablo.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Tello, Latinized as Tellus, probably of ancient Germanic origin.
Italian: from a short form of a personal name formed with this suffix, as for example Donatello, Muscatello , Otello.

variants.name: Telles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Adolpho, Alfonso, Armando, Francisco, Jorge, Pablo, Ramon, Ruben, Alberto.
Portuguese: patronymic from the medieval personal name Tellus, probably of ancient Germanic origin.
Spanish: variant of   Tellez  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meneses
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jorge, Francisco, Mario, Juan, Orlando, Alejandro, Arturo, Benigno.  Portuguese Joao, Mateus, Henrique, Joaquim, Ligia.
Spanish and Portuguese: habitational name from either of two places called Meneses de Campos in Palencia and Castile, Spain.

variants.name: Menezes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Luiz, Marcos, Sergio, Alberto, Antero, Eduardo, Adelino, Alda, Ana, Ana Maria.  Portuguese Ademir, Almir, Guilherme, Marcio, Paulo.  Indian Geetha, Jeevan, Naresh, Rahul, Rohit, Shalini, Vinod, Vivek.
Portuguese and Spanish: variant of   Meneses  . This surname is also found in western India and in East Timor, to which it was brought by Portuguese colonists in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Alfonso Téllez de Meneses was born about 1161, in Castilla la Vieja, Spain, his father, Tello Pérez de Meneses, was 21 and his mother, Gontroda García de Villamayor, was 23. He married Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos about 1201, in Castilla la Vieja, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1230, in Corcos del Valle, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 70, and was buried in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alfonso Téllez de Meneses est né environ 1161, à Castilla la Vieja, Espagne, son père, Tello Pérez de Meneses, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Gontroda García de Villamayor, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos environ 1201, à Castilla la Vieja, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1230, à Corcos del Valle, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alfonso Téllez de Meneses um 1161 in Castilla la Vieja, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tello Pérez de Meneses 21 und seine Mutter Gontroda García de Villamayor 23. Er hat um 1201 in Castilla la Vieja, Spanien Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Corcos del Valle, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso Téllez de Meneses è nato il circa 1161 nel Castilla la Vieja, Spagna, il suo padre, Tello Pérez de Meneses, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Gontroda García de Villamayor, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos circa 1201, nel Castilla la Vieja, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1230, nel Corcos del Valle, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Alfonso Téllez de Menesesが約1161年にスペインカスティラ ラ ヴィエジャで生まれた時，父Tello Pérez de Menesesは21歳，母Gontroda García de Villamayorは23歳であった。約1201年にスペインカスティラ ラ ヴィエジャでElvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1230年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドコルコス デル ヴァルで70歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドにて埋葬された。

ko.Corcos, Valhadolid, Castilla y León, Esp: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 코르코스 데 발
ko.Montealegre,Valladolid,Espanha: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 몽올그르 데 캄푸스 몽올그르
ko.lifeSummary: Alfonso Téllez de Meneses(이)가 대략 1161년 스페인 카스틸라 라 비자에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tello Pérez de Meneses(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Gontroda García de Villamayor(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1201년 스페인 카스틸라 라 비자에서 Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1230년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 코르코스 데 발에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso Téllez de Meneses nasceu aproximadamente 1161, em Castilla la Vieja, Espanha, seu pai, Tello Pérez de Meneses, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Gontroda García de Villamayor, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos aproximadamente 1201, em Castilla la Vieja, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1230, em Corcos del Valle, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alfonso Téllez de Meneses родился около 1161 г. в местности кастилла ла виеджа, Испания, его отцу по имени Tello Pérez de Meneses было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Gontroda García de Villamayor, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos около 1201 г. в местности кастилла ла виеджа, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1230 г. в местности коркос дель валл, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alfonso Téllez de Meneses nació aproximadamente 1161, en Castilla la Vieja, España, su papá, Tello Pérez de Meneses, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Gontroda García de Villamayor, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elvira Ruiz de Guzman  y Gutierrez de Ceballos aproximadamente 1201, en Castilla la Vieja, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1230, en Corcos del Valle, Valladolid, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Valladolid, Castilla y León, España.
